data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pass/fail determination per item in the safety inspection checklist. However, the evidence provided only confirms the pass/fail status for the lights checkpoint, while it lacks comprehensive validation for all required checkpoints, such as the horn. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not confirm that all items have been evaluated as required.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all required checkpoints, specifically the horn.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed inspection checklist validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify pass/fail determination for all checkpoints.
